今日(2024-08-01)Arxiv最新论文

发表于2024-08-01|更新于2024-08-09|学术会议Arxiv
|字数总计:147.5k|阅读时长:805分钟|阅读量:|评论数:

本篇博文主要展示 2024-08-01 从Arxiv.org论文网站获取的最新论文列表，自动更新，按照NLP、CV、ML、AI、IR五个大方向区分，若需要邮件定时接收，请在评论区留下你的邮箱号。

自然语言处理

[NLP-0] Safetywashing: Do AI Safety Benchmarks Actually Measure Safety Progress?
[NLP-0] Safetywashing：人工智能安全基准真的能衡量安全进步吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21792
作者: Richard Ren,Steven Basart,Adam Khoja,Alice Gatti,Long Phan,Xuwang Yin,Mantas Mazeika,Alexander Pan,Gabriel Mukobi,Ryan H. Kim,Stephen Fitz,Dan Hendrycks
关键词-EN: artificial intelligence systems, intelligence systems grow, safety, grow more powerful, future risks
关键词-ZN: 人工智能系统、智能系统发展、安全、变得更强大、未来风险
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:As artificial intelligence systems grow more powerful, there has been increasing interest in “AI safety” research to address emerging and future risks. However, the field of AI safety remains poorly defined and inconsistently measured, leading to confusion about how researchers can contribute. This lack of clarity is compounded by the unclear relationship between AI safety benchmarks and upstream general capabilities (e.g., general knowledge and reasoning). To address these issues, we conduct a comprehensive meta-analysis of AI safety benchmarks, empirically analyzing their correlation with general capabilities across dozens of models and providing a survey of existing directions in AI safety. Our findings reveal that many safety benchmarks highly correlate with upstream model capabilities, potentially enabling “safetywashing” – where capability improvements are misrepresented as safety advancements. Based on these findings, we propose an empirical foundation for developing more meaningful safety metrics and define AI safety in a machine learning research context as a set of clearly delineated research goals that are empirically separable from generic capabilities advancements. In doing so, we aim to provide a more rigorous framework for AI safety research, advancing the science of safety evaluations and clarifying the path towards measurable progress.
摘要：随着人工智能系统变得越来越强大，人们越来越感兴趣的是用于应对正在出现的和未来的风险的“人工智能安全”研究。然而，人工智能安全领域仍然定义不清，衡量标准参差不齐，导致人们对研究人员如何做出贡献感到困惑。人工智能安全基准和上游一般能力(例如，常识和推理)之间的关系不明确，加剧了这种缺乏明确性。为了解决这些问题，我们对人工智能安全基准进行了全面的荟萃分析，实证分析了它们与数十个模型的一般能力的相关性，并对人工智能安全的现有方向进行了调查。我们的发现显示，许多安全基准与上游模型的能力高度相关，潜在地实现了“安全清洗”–即能力改进被错误地描述为安全进步。基于这些发现，我们提出了开发更有意义的安全度量的经验基础，并将机器学习研究背景下的人工智能安全定义为一组明确描述的研究目标，这些目标在经验上可与通用能力进步分开。通过这样做，我们的目标是为人工智能安全研究提供一个更严格的框架，推进安全评估的科学，并澄清通往可衡量进展的道路。

[NLP-1] Vision-Language Model Based Handwriting Verification
[NLP-1] 基于视觉语言模型的笔迹验证

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21788
作者: Mihir Chauhan,Abhishek Satbhai,Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi,Mir Basheer Ali,Bina Ramamurthy,Mingchen Gao,Siwei Lyu,Sargur Srihari
关键词-EN: Handwriting Verification, Vision Language Models, forensic document examiners, Visual Question Answering, document examiners due
关键词-ZN: 手写验证、视觉语言模型、法医文件审查员、视觉问题解答、文件审查员到期
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: 4 Pages, 1 Figure, 1 Table, Accepted as Short paper at Irish Machine Vision and Image Processing (IMVIP) Conference

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Handwriting Verification is a critical in document forensics. Deep learning based approaches often face skepticism from forensic document examiners due to their lack of explainability and reliance on extensive training data and handcrafted features. This paper explores using Vision Language Models (VLMs), such as OpenAI’s GPT-4o and Google’s PaliGemma, to address these challenges. By leveraging their Visual Question Answering capabilities and 0-shot Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, our goal is to provide clear, human-understandable explanations for model decisions. Our experiments on the CEDAR handwriting dataset demonstrate that VLMs offer enhanced interpretability, reduce the need for large training datasets, and adapt better to diverse handwriting styles. However, results show that the CNN-based ResNet-18 architecture outperforms the 0-shot CoT prompt engineering approach with GPT-4o (Accuracy: 70%) and supervised fine-tuned PaliGemma (Accuracy: 71%), achieving an accuracy of 84% on the CEDAR AND dataset. These findings highlight the potential of VLMs in generating human-interpretable decisions while underscoring the need for further advancements to match the performance of specialized deep learning models.
摘要：笔迹鉴定是物证取证中的一个关键问题。基于深度学习的方法往往面临法医文件审查员的怀疑，因为它们缺乏可解释性，并且依赖于广泛的训练数据和手工制作的特征。本文探讨了使用视觉语言模型(VLM)来应对这些挑战，例如OpenAI的GPT-4o和Google的PaliGema。通过利用他们的视觉问答能力和0-Shots-Chain-of-Think(COT)推理，我们的目标是为模型决策提供清晰、人类可以理解的解释。我们在Cedar手写数据集上的实验表明，VLMS提供了更好的可解释性，减少了对大型训练数据集的需求，并更好地适应了不同的手写风格。然而，结果表明，基于CNN的ResNet-18结构在Cedar和数据集上的准确率为84%，优于GPT-40(准确率：70%)和有监督微调PaliGema(准确率：71%)的0-shot COT Prompt工程方法。这些发现突出了虚拟学习模型在产生人类可解释的决策方面的潜力，同时强调了进一步进步的必要性，以与专门的深度学习模型的表现相匹配。

[NLP-2] he Llama 3 Herd of Models
[NLP-2] 骆驼3群模特

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21783
作者: Abhimanyu Dubey,Abhinav Jauhri,Abhinav Pandey,Abhishek Kadian,Ahmad Al-Dahle,Aiesha Letman,Akhil Mathur,Alan Schelten,Amy Yang,Angela Fan,Anirudh Goyal,Anthony Hartshorn,Aobo Yang,Archi Mitra,Archie Sravankumar,Artem Korenev,Arthur Hinsvark,Arun Rao,Aston Zhang,Aurelien Rodriguez,Austen Gregerson,Ava Spataru,Baptiste Roziere,Bethany Biron,Binh Tang,Bobbie Chern,Charlotte Caucheteux,Chaya Nayak,Chloe Bi,Chris Marra,Chris McConnell,Christian Keller,Christophe Touret,Chunyang Wu,Corinne Wong,Cristian Canton Ferrer,Cyrus Nikolaidis,Damien Allonsius,Daniel Song,Danielle Pintz,Danny Livshits,David Esiobu,Dhruv Choudhary,Dhruv Mahajan,Diego Garcia-Olano,Diego Perino,Dieuwke Hupkes,Egor Lakomkin,Ehab AlBadawy,Elina Lobanova,Emily Dinan,Eric Michael Smith,Filip Radenovic,Frank Zhang,Gabriel Synnaeve,Gabrielle Lee,Georgia Lewis Anderson,Graeme Nail,Gregoire Mialon,Guan Pang,Guillem Cucurell,Hailey Nguyen,Hannah Korevaar,Hu Xu,Hugo Touvron,Iliyan Zarov,Imanol Arrieta Ibarra,Isabel Kloumann,Ishan Misra,Ivan Evtimov,Jade Copet,Jaewon Lee,Jan Geffert,Jana Vranes,Jason Park,Jay Mahadeokar,Jeet Shah,Jelmer van der Linde,Jennifer Billock,Jenny Hong,Jenya Lee,Jeremy Fu,Jianfeng Chi,Jianyu Huang,Jiawen Liu,Jie Wang,Jiecao Yu,Joanna Bitton,Joe Spisak,Jongsoo Park,Joseph Rocca,Joshua Johnstun,Joshua Saxe,Junteng Jia,Kalyan Vasuden Alwala,Kartikeya Upasani,Kate Plawiak,Ke Li,Kenneth Heafield,Kevin Stone
关键词-EN: Modern artificial intelligence, Modern artificial, artificial intelligence, systems are powered, Llama
关键词-ZN: 现代人工智能，现代人工，人工智能，系统有动力，骆驼
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Modern artificial intelligence (AI) systems are powered by foundation models. This paper presents a new set of foundation models, called Llama 3. It is a herd of language models that natively support multilinguality, coding, reasoning, and tool usage. Our largest model is a dense Transformer with 405B parameters and a context window of up to 128K tokens. This paper presents an extensive empirical evaluation of Llama 3. We find that Llama 3 delivers comparable quality to leading language models such as GPT-4 on a plethora of tasks. We publicly release Llama 3, including pre-trained and post-trained versions of the 405B parameter language model and our Llama Guard 3 model for input and output safety. The paper also presents the results of experiments in which we integrate image, video, and speech capabilities into Llama 3 via a compositional approach. We observe this approach performs competitively with the state-of-the-art on image, video, and speech recognition tasks. The resulting models are not yet being broadly released as they are still under development.
摘要：现代人工智能系统是由基础模型驱动的。本文提出了一组新的基础模型，称为Llama3。它是一组自然支持多种语言、编码、推理和工具使用的语言模型。我们最大的模型是一个具有405B参数和高达128K令牌的上下文窗口的密集转换器。本文对Llama 3进行了广泛的实证评估。我们发现，Llama 3在过多的任务上提供了与GPT-4等领先语言模型相当的质量。我们公开发布Llama 3，包括用于输入和输出安全的405B参数语言模型和我们的Llama Guard 3模型的预培训和后培训版本。本文还给出了我们通过组合方法将图像、视频和语音功能集成到Llama 3中的实验结果。我们观察到，该方法在图像、视频和语音识别任务上的性能与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。由此产生的模型尚未广泛发布，因为它们仍在开发中。

[NLP-3] ShieldGemma: Generative AI Content Moderation Based on Gemma
[NLP-3] ShieldGemma：基于Gemma的生成人工智能内容审核

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21772
作者: Wenjun Zeng,Yuchi Liu,Ryan Mullins,Ludovic Peran,Joe Fernandez,Hamza Harkous,Karthik Narasimhan,Drew Proud,Piyush Kumar,Bhaktipriya Radharapu,Olivia Sturman,Oscar Wahltinez
关键词-EN: comprehensive suite, moderation models built, Llama Guard, content moderation, models built
关键词-ZN: 全面的套件、构建的审核模型、Lama Guard、内容审核、构建的模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present ShieldGemma, a comprehensive suite of LLM-based safety content moderation models built upon Gemma2. These models provide robust, state-of-the-art predictions of safety risks across key harm types (sexually explicit, dangerous content, harassment, hate speech) in both user input and LLM-generated output. By evaluating on both public and internal benchmarks, we demonstrate superior performance compared to existing models, such as Llama Guard (+10.8% AU-PRC on public benchmarks) and WildCard (+4.3%). Additionally, we present a novel LLM-based data curation pipeline, adaptable to a variety of safety-related tasks and beyond. We have shown strong generalization performance for model trained mainly on synthetic data. By releasing ShieldGemma, we provide a valuable resource to the research community, advancing LLM safety and enabling the creation of more effective content moderation solutions for developers.
摘要：我们介绍了ShieldGemma，这是一套基于Gemma 2的全面的基于LLM的安全内容审核模型。这些模型为用户输入和LLM生成的输出中的关键伤害类型（露骨、危险内容、骚扰、仇恨言论）的安全风险提供了稳健的、最先进的预测。通过对公共和内部基准进行评估，我们展示了与现有型号相比的卓越性能，例如Llama Guard（公共基准上+10. 8% AU-PRC）和WildCard（+4.3%%）。此外，我们还提供了一种新型的基于LLM的数据策展管道，可适应各种安全相关任务及其他任务。我们已经表现出主要在合成数据上训练的模型很强的概括性能。通过发布ShieldGemma，我们为研究界提供了宝贵的资源，提高了LLM安全性，并为开发人员创建更有效的内容审核解决方案。

[NLP-4] Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Conversational Systems
[NLP-4] 对话系统的自适应检索增强生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21712
作者: Xi Wang,Procheta Sen,Ruizhe Li,Emine Yilmaz
关键词-EN: integrating large language, large language models, success of integrating, integrating large, large language
关键词-ZN: 集成大型语言，大型语言模型，集成的成功，集成大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
备注: 12 pages, under review

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Despite the success of integrating large language models into the development of conversational systems, many studies have shown the effectiveness of retrieving and augmenting external knowledge for informative responses. Hence, many existing studies commonly assume the always need for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) in a conversational system without explicit control. This raises a research question about such a necessity. In this study, we propose to investigate the need for each turn of system response to be augmented with external knowledge. In particular, by leveraging human judgements on the binary choice of adaptive augmentation, we develop RAGate, a gating model, which models conversation context and relevant inputs to predict if a conversational system requires RAG for improved responses. We conduct extensive experiments on devising and applying RAGate to conversational models and well-rounded analyses of different conversational scenarios. Our experimental results and analysis indicate the effective application of RAGate in RAG-based conversational systems in identifying system responses for appropriate RAG with high-quality responses and a high generation confidence. This study also identifies the correlation between the generation’s confidence level and the relevance of the augmented knowledge.
摘要：尽管将大型语言模型整合到会话系统的开发中取得了成功，但许多研究表明，检索和增强外部知识用于信息性反应是有效的。因此，许多现有的研究通常假设在没有明确控制的会话系统中总是需要提取增强生成(RAG)。这就提出了一个关于这种必要性的研究问题。在这项研究中，我们建议调查系统的每一轮反应是否需要用外部知识来增强。特别是，通过利用人类对自适应增强的二元选择的判断，我们开发了RAGate，一个门控模型，它对对话上下文和相关输入进行建模，以预测对话系统是否需要RAG来改善响应。我们进行了大量的实验，设计并应用RAGate来建立会话模型，并对不同的会话场景进行全面的分析。我们的实验结果和分析表明，RAGate在基于RAG的会话系统中有效地应用于识别系统对适当RAG的响应，具有高质量的响应和高的生成置信度。这项研究还确定了生成的置信度水平与增强的知识的相关性之间的相关性。

[NLP-5] Synth-Empathy: Towards High-Quality Synthetic Empathy Data
[NLP-5] 合成同理心：迈向高质量的合成同理心数据

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21669
作者: Hao Liang,Linzhuang Sun,Jingxuan Wei,Xijie Huang,Linkun Sun,Bihui Yu,Conghui He,Wentao Zhang
关键词-EN: achieving excellent empathetic, large language models, recent years, achieving excellent, crucial prerequisite
关键词-ZN: 近年来，实现了出色的同理心、大型语言模型，实现了出色的关键先决条件
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2407.01937

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In recent years, with the rapid advancements in large language models (LLMs), achieving excellent empathetic response capabilities has become a crucial prerequisite. Consequently, managing and understanding empathetic datasets have gained increasing significance. However, empathetic data are typically human-labeled, leading to insufficient datasets and wasted human labor. In this work, we present Synth-Empathy, an LLM-based data generation and quality and diversity selection pipeline that automatically generates high-quality empathetic data while discarding low-quality data. With the data generated from a low empathetic model, we are able to further improve empathetic response performance and achieve state-of-the-art (SoTA) results across multiple benchmarks. Moreover, our model achieves SoTA performance on various human evaluation benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness and robustness in real-world applications. Furthermore, we show the trade-off between data quantity and quality, providing insights into empathetic data generation and selection.
摘要：近年来，随着大型语言模型的快速发展，获得优秀的共情反应能力已成为一个至关重要的前提。因此，管理和理解移情数据集变得越来越重要。然而，移情数据通常被贴上人类的标签，导致数据集不足，浪费人力。在这项工作中，我们提出了Synth-Emperience，一个基于LLM的数据生成和质量和多样性选择流水线，它自动生成高质量的同理心数据，同时丢弃低质量的数据。使用低共鸣模型生成的数据，我们能够进一步提高共鸣响应性能，并在多个基准中实现最先进的(SOTA)结果。此外，我们的模型在各种人类评价基准上实现了SOTA性能，在实际应用中证明了它的有效性和稳健性。此外，我们展示了数据数量和质量之间的权衡，为移情数据的生成和选择提供了见解。

[NLP-6] Defending Jailbreak Attack in VLMs via Cross-modality Information Detector ACL
[NLP-6] 通过跨模式信息检测器防御VLM中的越狱攻击

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21659
作者: Yue Xu,Xiuyuan Qi,Zhan Qin,Wenjie Wang
关键词-EN: Vision Language Models, achieving remarkable performance, comprehensively understand vision, Language Models, Vision Language
关键词-ZN: 视觉语言模型，实现卓越性能，全面理解视觉，语言模型，视觉语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 12 pages, 9 figures, ACL ARR 2024 June Submission

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Vision Language Models (VLMs) extend the capacity of LLMs to comprehensively understand vision information, achieving remarkable performance in many vision-centric tasks. Despite that, recent studies have shown that these models are susceptible to jailbreak attacks, which refer to an exploitative technique where malicious users can break the safety alignment of the target model and generate misleading and harmful answers. This potential threat is caused by both the inherent vulnerabilities of LLM and the larger attack scope introduced by vision input. To enhance the security of VLMs against jailbreak attacks, researchers have developed various defense techniques. However, these methods either require modifications to the model’s internal structure or demand significant computational resources during the inference phase. Multimodal information is a double-edged sword. While it increases the risk of attacks, it also provides additional data that can enhance safeguards. Inspired by this, we propose \underline\textbfC ross-modality \underline\textbfI nformation \underline\textbfDE tecto \underline\textbfR ( \textitCIDER) , a plug-and-play jailbreaking detector designed to identify maliciously perturbed image inputs, utilizing the cross-modal similarity between harmful queries and adversarial images. This simple yet effective cross-modality information detector, \textitCIDER , is independent of the target VLMs and requires less computation cost. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of \textitCIDER , as well as its transferability to both white-box and black-box VLMs.
摘要：视觉语言模型扩展了视觉语言模型全面理解视觉信息的能力，在许多以视觉为中心的任务中取得了显著的效果。尽管如此，最近的研究表明，这些模型容易受到越狱攻击，越狱攻击指的是一种利用技术，恶意用户可以破坏目标模型的安全对齐，并生成误导性和有害的答案。这种潜在的威胁既是由LLM固有的漏洞造成的，也是由视觉输入引入的更大的攻击范围造成的。为了增强VLMS抵御越狱攻击的安全性，研究人员开发了各种防御技术。然而，这些方法要么需要修改模型的内部结构，要么在推理阶段需要大量的计算资源。多式联运信息是一把双刃剑。虽然它增加了攻击的风险，但它也提供了额外的数据，可以加强安全措施。受此启发，我们提出了一种即插即用的越狱检测器，旨在利用有害查询和敌意图像之间的跨模式相似性来识别恶意扰动的图像输入。这种简单有效的跨通道信息检测器大量的实验结果证明了文本CIDER的有效性和高效性，以及它对白盒和黑盒VLM的可转换性。

[NLP-7] owards Achieving Human Parity on End-to-end Simultaneous Speech Translation via LLM Agent
[NLP-7] 通过LLM代理实现端到端同步语音翻译的人类对等

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21646
作者: Shanbo Cheng,Zhichao Huang,Tom Ko,Hang Li,Ningxin Peng,Lu Xu,Qini Zhang
关键词-EN: Cross Language Agent, human-like Simultaneous Speech, present Cross Language, Simultaneous Speech Translation, Simultaneous Interpretation
关键词-ZN: 跨语言代理、类人同步语音、当前跨语言、同步语音翻译、同声传译
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Authors are listed in alphabetical order by last name. Demonstrations and human-annotated test sets are available at this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we present Cross Language Agent – Simultaneous Interpretation, CLASI, a high-quality and human-like Simultaneous Speech Translation (SiST) System. Inspired by professional human interpreters, we utilize a novel data-driven read-write strategy to balance the translation quality and latency. To address the challenge of translating in-domain terminologies, CLASI employs a multi-modal retrieving module to obtain relevant information to augment the translation. Supported by LLMs, our approach can generate error-tolerated translation by considering the input audio, historical context, and retrieved information. Experimental results show that our system outperforms other systems by significant margins. Aligned with professional human interpreters, we evaluate CLASI with a better human evaluation metric, valid information proportion (VIP), which measures the amount of information that can be successfully conveyed to the listeners. In the real-world scenarios, where the speeches are often disfluent, informal, and unclear, CLASI achieves VIP of 81.3% and 78.0% for Chinese-to-English and English-to-Chinese translation directions, respectively. In contrast, state-of-the-art commercial or open-source systems only achieve 35.4% and 41.6%. On the extremely hard dataset, where other systems achieve under 13% VIP, CLASI can still achieve 70% VIP.
摘要：在本文中，我们介绍了一个高质量的、类似人类的同声传译系统CLASI，即跨语言代理。在专业翻译人员的启发下，我们采用了一种新颖的数据驱动的读写策略来平衡翻译质量和延迟。为了应对翻译领域内术语的挑战，CLASI使用了一个多模式检索模块来获取相关信息来增强翻译。在LLMS的支持下，我们的方法可以通过考虑输入音频、历史上下文和检索到的信息来生成容错翻译。实验结果表明，该系统的性能明显优于其他系统。在专业译员的配合下，我们用一个更好的人类评价指标–有效信息比例(VIP)来评价CLASI，该指标衡量了能够成功传达给听者的信息量。在实际场景中，演讲往往不流利、非正式和不清楚，Clasi在汉译英和英译汉方向上的VIP分别达到了81.3%和78.0%。相比之下，最先进的商业或开源系统只达到了35.4%和41.6%。在极硬的数据集上，其他系统的VIP达到13%以下，Clasi仍然可以达到70%的VIP。

[NLP-8] Zero-Shot Cross-Domain Dialogue State Tracking via Dual Low-Rank Adaptation ACL2024
[NLP-8] 通过双低等级自适应的零镜头跨域对话状态跟踪

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21633
作者: Xiang Luo,Zhiwen Tang,Jin Wang,Xuejie Zhang
关键词-EN: dialogue state tracking, enable dialogue systems, state tracking, seeks to enable, extensive retraining
关键词-ZN: 对话状态跟踪、启用对话系统、状态跟踪、寻求启用、广泛的再培训
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted by ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Zero-shot dialogue state tracking (DST) seeks to enable dialogue systems to transition to unfamiliar domains without manual annotation or extensive retraining. Prior research has approached this objective by embedding prompts into language models (LMs). Common methodologies include integrating prompts at the input layer or introducing learnable variables at each transformer layer. Nonetheless, each strategy exhibits inherent limitations. Prompts integrated at the input layer risk underutilization, with their impact potentially diminishing across successive transformer layers. Conversely, the addition of learnable variables to each layer can complicate the training process and increase inference latency. To tackle the issues mentioned above, this paper proposes Dual Low-Rank Adaptation (DualLoRA), a plug-and-play architecture designed for zero-shot DST. DualLoRA incorporates two distinct Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) components, targeting both dialogue context processing and prompt optimization, to ensure the comprehensive influence of prompts throughout the transformer model layers. This is achieved without incurring additional inference latency, showcasing an efficient integration into existing architectures. Through rigorous evaluation on the MultiWOZ and SGD datasets, DualLoRA demonstrates notable improvements across multiple domains, outperforming traditional baseline methods in zero-shot settings. Our code is accessible at: \urlthis https URL.
摘要：零镜头对话状态跟踪(DST)旨在使对话系统能够过渡到不熟悉的领域，而不需要人工标注或广泛的再培训。先前的研究已经通过将提示嵌入语言模型(LMS)来接近这一目标。常见的方法包括在输入层集成提示或在每个转换器层引入可学习的变量。尽管如此，每种战略都显示出固有的局限性。在输入层集成的提示有未充分利用的风险，其影响在连续的变压器层中可能会减弱。相反，向每一层添加可学习变量会使训练过程复杂化，并增加推理延迟。针对上述问题，本文提出了一种适用于零触发DST的即插即用结构–双低阶适配(DualLoRA)。DualLoRA结合了两个不同的低级适配(LORA)组件，分别针对对话上下文处理和提示优化，以确保提示在整个变压器模型层中的全面影响。这是在不引起额外的推理延迟的情况下实现的，展示了与现有体系结构的有效集成。通过对MultiWOZ和SGD数据集的严格评估，DualLoRA在多个领域显示出显著的改进，在零镜头设置下表现优于传统的基线方法。我们的代码可通过以下地址访问：\urlThis HTTPS URL。

[NLP-9] AROT: Task-Oriented Authorship Obfuscation Using Policy Optimization Methods
[NLP-9] AROT：使用策略优化方法的面向任务的作者混淆

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21630
作者: Gabriel Loiseau,Damien Sileo,Damien Riquet,Maxime Meyer,Marc Tommasi
关键词-EN: Authorship obfuscation aims, Authorship obfuscation, writing style, aims to disguise, altering the writing
关键词-ZN: 作者混淆的目的，作者混淆，写作风格，旨在伪装，改变写作
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Authorship obfuscation aims to disguise the identity of an author within a text by altering the writing style, vocabulary, syntax, and other linguistic features associated with the text author. This alteration needs to balance privacy and utility. While strong obfuscation techniques can effectively hide the author’s identity, they often degrade the quality and usefulness of the text for its intended purpose. Conversely, maintaining high utility tends to provide insufficient privacy, making it easier for an adversary to de-anonymize the author. Thus, achieving an optimal trade-off between these two conflicting objectives is crucial. In this paper, we propose TAROT: Task-Oriented Authorship Obfuscation Using Policy Optimization, a new unsupervised authorship obfuscation method whose goal is to optimize the privacy-utility trade-off by regenerating the entire text considering its downstream utility. Our approach leverages policy optimization as a fine-tuning paradigm over small language models in order to rewrite texts by preserving author identity and downstream task utility. We show that our approach largely reduce the accuracy of attackers while preserving utility. We make our code and models publicly available.
摘要：作者身份混淆旨在通过改变与文本作者相关的写作风格、词汇、句法和其他语言特征来掩盖作者在文本中的身份。这一改变需要平衡隐私和效用。虽然强大的混淆技术可以有效地隐藏作者的身份，但它们往往会降低文本的质量和对预期目的的有用性。相反，保持高实用性往往会提供不充分的隐私，使对手更容易解除作者的匿名。因此，在这两个相互冲突的目标之间实现最佳权衡至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的无监督作者身份混淆方法–TAROT：基于策略优化的面向任务的作者身份混淆方法，其目标是通过重新生成考虑下游效用的整个文本来优化隐私和效用之间的权衡。我们的方法利用策略优化作为小语言模型上的微调范式，以便通过保留作者身份和下游任务效用来重写文本。我们表明，我们的方法在很大程度上降低了攻击者的准确性，同时保持了实用性。我们公开我们的代码和模型。

[NLP-10] PMoE: Progressive Mixture of Experts with Asymmetric Transformer for Continual Learning
[NLP-10] PMoE：采用不对称Transformer的渐进式专家混合，用于持续学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21571
作者: Min Jae Jung,JooHee Kim
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, encounter significant challenges, continual learning due, overwrites previously acquired, previously acquired knowledge
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，遇到重大挑战，持续学习，覆盖以前获得的、以前获得的知识
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) encounter significant challenges in continual learning due to catastrophic forgetting, where new information overwrites previously acquired knowledge. This limitation leads to substantial environmental and economic waste. In this study, we introduce the PMoE, Progressive Mixture of Experts with Asymmetric Transformer, which aims to minimize forgetting by utilizing an asymmetric design with shallow layers dedicated to general knowledge and deep layers for new knowledge. PMoE incorporates progressively added experts in deep layers and a router that allocates new knowledge to the appropriate experts efficiently. The router, positioned adjacent to the deep layers, utilizes deep features aggregating consolidated information. This enables the router to perform efficiently, allocating new knowledge to the appropriate experts, which progressively increase in the deep layers. Extensive experiments on TRACE datasets and general language understanding datasets demonstrate that the proposed PMoE outperforms previous state-of-the-art approaches.
摘要：由于灾难性的遗忘，大语言模型(LLM)在持续学习方面遇到了巨大的挑战，新的信息覆盖了以前获得的知识。这一限制导致了大量的环境和经济浪费。在这项研究中，我们介绍了PMoE，专家与非对称变压器的渐进式混合，旨在通过使用浅层专门用于一般知识而深层用于新知识的非对称设计来最大限度地减少遗忘。PMoE结合了逐步增加的深层专家和路由器，可将新知识高效地分配给适当的专家。路由器位于深层附近，利用深层功能聚合整合的信息。这使路由器能够高效地运行，将新知识分配给相应的专家，这些专家在深层逐渐增加。在踪迹数据集和通用语言理解数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的PMoE方法的性能优于以往的最新方法。

[NLP-11] Generative Sentiment Analysis via Latent Category Distribution and Constrained Decoding
[NLP-11] 通过潜在类别分布和约束解码进行生成情绪分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21560
作者: Jun Zhou,Dongyang Yu,Kamran Aziz,Fangfang Su,Qing Zhang,Fei Li,Donghong Ji
关键词-EN: Fine-grained sentiment analysis, organizing sentiment elements, analysis involves extracting, sentiment analysis involves, Fine-grained sentiment
关键词-ZN: 细粒度情感分析，组织情感元素，分析涉及提取，情感分析涉及，细粒度情感
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Fine-grained sentiment analysis involves extracting and organizing sentiment elements from textual data. However, existing approaches often overlook issues of category semantic inclusion and overlap, as well as inherent structural patterns within the target sequence. This study introduces a generative sentiment analysis model. To address the challenges related to category semantic inclusion and overlap, a latent category distribution variable is introduced. By reconstructing the input of a variational autoencoder, the model learns the intensity of the relationship between categories and text, thereby improving sequence generation. Additionally, a trie data structure and constrained decoding strategy are utilized to exploit structural patterns, which in turn reduces the search space and regularizes the generation process. Experimental results on the Restaurant-ACOS and Laptop-ACOS datasets demonstrate a significant performance improvement compared to baseline models. Ablation experiments further confirm the effectiveness of latent category distribution and constrained decoding strategy.
摘要：细粒度情感分析涉及从文本数据中提取和组织情感元素。然而，现有的方法往往忽略了类别语义包含和重叠的问题，以及目标序列中固有的结构模式。本研究介绍了一种生成性情感分析模型。为了解决与类别语义包含和重叠相关的挑战，引入了一个潜在类别分布变量。通过重构变分自动编码器的输入，该模型学习类别和文本之间关系的强度，从而改进序列生成。此外，使用Trie数据结构和约束解码策略来挖掘结构模式，从而减少了搜索空间并规范了生成过程。在Restaurant-ACOS和Laptop-ACOs数据集上的实验结果表明，与基准模型相比，性能有了显著的提高。烧蚀实验进一步证实了潜在类别分布和约束译码策略的有效性。

[NLP-12] racing Intricate Cues in Dialogue: Joint Graph Structure and Sentiment Dynamics for Multimodal Emotion Recognition
[NLP-12] 对话中的复杂线索：多模式情感识别的联合图结构和情感动力学

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21536
作者: Jiang Li,Xiaoping Wang,Zhigang Zeng
关键词-EN: research attention recently, garnered substantial research, substantial research attention, Multimodal emotion recognition, attention recently
关键词-ZN: 最近的研究关注，获得了大量研究，大量研究关注，多模式情感识别，最近的关注
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Submitted

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal emotion recognition in conversation (MERC) has garnered substantial research attention recently. Existing MERC methods face several challenges: (1) they fail to fully harness direct inter-modal cues, possibly leading to less-than-thorough cross-modal modeling; (2) they concurrently extract information from the same and different modalities at each network layer, potentially triggering conflicts from the fusion of multi-source data; (3) they lack the agility required to detect dynamic sentimental changes, perhaps resulting in inaccurate classification of utterances with abrupt sentiment shifts. To address these issues, a novel approach named GraphSmile is proposed for tracking intricate emotional cues in multimodal dialogues. GraphSmile comprises two key components, i.e., GSF and SDP modules. GSF ingeniously leverages graph structures to alternately assimilate inter-modal and intra-modal emotional dependencies layer by layer, adequately capturing cross-modal cues while effectively circumventing fusion conflicts. SDP is an auxiliary task to explicitly delineate the sentiment dynamics between utterances, promoting the model’s ability to distinguish sentimental discrepancies. Furthermore, GraphSmile is effortlessly applied to multimodal sentiment analysis in conversation (MSAC), forging a unified multimodal affective model capable of executing MERC and MSAC tasks. Empirical results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that GraphSmile can handle complex emotional and sentimental patterns, significantly outperforming baseline models.
摘要：会话中的多通道情绪识别近年来得到了广泛的研究关注。现有的MERC方法面临着几个挑战：(1)它们不能充分利用直接的跨通道线索，可能导致不彻底的跨通道建模；(2)它们在每个网络层同时从相同和不同的通道提取信息，潜在地引发多源数据融合的冲突；(3)它们缺乏检测动态情感变化所需的敏捷性，可能导致对具有突然情绪变化的话语的不准确分类。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种新的跟踪多通道对话中复杂情感线索的方法–GraphSmile.GraphSmilar包括两个关键组件，即GSF和SDP模块。GSF巧妙地利用图结构逐层交替同化通道间和通道内的情感依赖关系，充分捕获跨通道线索，同时有效地规避融合冲突。SDP是一项辅助任务，用于明确描述话语之间的情感动态，提高模型区分情感差异的能力。此外，GraphSmilar还被轻松地应用于会话中的多通道情感分析(MSAC)，构建了一个能够执行MERC和MSAC任务的统一的多通道情感模型。在多个基准上的实验结果表明，GraphSmile能够处理复杂的情感和情感模式，显著优于基线模型。

[NLP-13] Can LLMs “Reason” in Music? An Evaluation of LLMs Capability of Music Understanding and Generation
[NLP-13] 法学硕士可以在音乐中“推理”吗？LLM音乐理解和生成能力的评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21531
作者: Ziya Zhou,Yuhang Wu,Zhiyue Wu,Xinyue Zhang,Ruibin Yuan,Yinghao Ma,Lu Wang,Emmanouil Benetos,Wei Xue,Yike Guo
关键词-EN: Symbolic Music, discrete symbols, encoded in discrete, symbolic music domain, Music
关键词-ZN: 象征性音乐，离散符号，编码在离散的象征性音乐领域，音乐
类目: ound (cs.SD); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Multimedia (cs.MM); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted by ISMIR2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Symbolic Music, akin to language, can be encoded in discrete symbols. Recent research has extended the application of large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4 and Llama2 to the symbolic music domain including understanding and generation. Yet scant research explores the details of how these LLMs perform on advanced music understanding and conditioned generation, especially from the multi-step reasoning perspective, which is a critical aspect in the conditioned, editable, and interactive human-computer co-creation process. This study conducts a thorough investigation of LLMs’ capability and limitations in symbolic music processing. We identify that current LLMs exhibit poor performance in song-level multi-step music reasoning, and typically fail to leverage learned music knowledge when addressing complex musical tasks. An analysis of LLMs’ responses highlights distinctly their pros and cons. Our findings suggest achieving advanced musical capability is not intrinsically obtained by LLMs, and future research should focus more on bridging the gap between music knowledge and reasoning, to improve the co-creation experience for musicians.
摘要：符号音乐类似于语言，可以用离散的符号进行编码。最近的研究已经将GPT-4和Llama2等大语言模型(LLM)的应用扩展到符号音乐领域，包括理解和生成。然而，很少有研究探索这些LLM如何在高级音乐理解和条件生成方面发挥作用，特别是从多步骤推理的角度，这是条件、可编辑和交互式人机共同创造过程中的一个关键方面。本研究对LLMS在符号音乐加工中的能力和局限性进行了深入的研究。我们发现，目前的LLM在歌曲级别的多步骤音乐推理中表现出较差的表现，并且在处理复杂的音乐任务时通常无法利用所学的音乐知识。对低收入国家反应的分析清楚地突显了它们的利弊。我们的发现表明，获得高级音乐能力并不是LLMS固有的，未来的研究应该更多地关注于弥合音乐知识和推理之间的差距，以改善音乐家的共同创作体验。

[NLP-14] Data Contamination Report from the 2024 CONDA Shared Task
[NLP-14] 2024年CONDA共享任务的数据污染报告

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21530
作者: Oscar Sainz,Iker García-Ferrero,Alon Jacovi,Jon Ander Campos,Yanai Elazar,Eneko Agirre,Yoav Goldberg,Wei-Lin Chen,Jenny Chim,Leshem Choshen,Luca D’Amico-Wong,Melissa Dell,Run-Ze Fan,Shahriar Golchin,Yucheng Li,Pengfei Liu,Bhavish Pahwa,Ameya Prabhu,Suryansh Sharma,Emily Silcock,Kateryna Solonko,David Stap,Mihai Surdeanu,Yu-Min Tseng,Vishaal Udandarao,Zengzhi Wang,Ruijie Xu,Jinglin Yang
关键词-EN: natural language processing, train large scale, large scale models, Data Contamination, compromising evaluation results
关键词-ZN: 自然语言处理、训练大规模、大规模模型、数据污染、损害评估结果
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The 1st Workshop on Data Contamination (CONDA 2024) focuses on all relevant aspects of data contamination in natural language processing, where data contamination is understood as situations where evaluation data is included in pre-training corpora used to train large scale models, compromising evaluation results. The workshop fostered a shared task to collect evidence on data contamination in current available datasets and models. The goal of the shared task and associated database is to assist the community in understanding the extent of the problem and to assist researchers in avoiding reporting evaluation results on known contaminated resources. The shared task provides a structured, centralized public database for the collection of contamination evidence, open to contributions from the community via GitHub pool requests. This first compilation paper is based on 566 reported entries over 91 contaminated sources from a total of 23 contributors. The details of the individual contamination events are available in the platform. The platform continues to be online, open to contributions from the community.
摘要：第一届数据污染研讨会(Conda 2024)聚焦于自然语言处理中数据污染的所有相关方面，其中数据污染被理解为评估数据被包含在用于训练大规模模型的预训练语料库中，从而危及评估结果的情况。讲习班促成了一项共同任务，即在现有的数据集和模型中收集关于数据污染的证据。共享任务和相关数据库的目标是协助社区了解问题的严重程度，并协助研究人员避免报告已知污染资源的评价结果。共享任务为收集污染证据提供了一个结构化的、集中化的公共数据库，通过GitHub池请求向社区开放。这篇第一篇汇编论文是基于来自23个投稿人的91个污染源上的566个报告条目。各个污染事件的详细信息可在平台上查看。该平台继续在线，向社区开放投稿。

[NLP-15] Interpreting and learning voice commands with a Large Language Model for a robot system
[NLP-15] 使用机器人系统的大型语言模型解释和学习语音命令

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21512
作者: Stanislau Stankevich,Wojciech Dudek
关键词-EN: daily life, assist staff, Large Language Models, increasingly common, common in industry
关键词-ZN: 日常生活，协助员工，大型语言模型，越来越常见，在行业中常见
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Neural and Evolutionary Computing (cs.NE)
备注: PP-RAI 2024, 5th Polish Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 18-20.04.2024 Warsaw, Poland

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Robots are increasingly common in industry and daily life, such as in nursing homes where they can assist staff. A key challenge is developing intuitive interfaces for easy communication. The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) like GPT-4 has enhanced robot capabilities, allowing for real-time interaction and decision-making. This integration improves robots’ adaptability and functionality. This project focuses on merging LLMs with databases to improve decision-making and enable knowledge acquisition for request interpretation problems.
摘要：机器人在工业和日常生活中越来越常见，例如在疗养院，它们可以帮助员工。一个关键挑战是开发直观的界面以实现轻松的通信。GPT-4等大型语言模型（LLM）的使用增强了机器人的能力，允许实时交互和决策。这种集成提高了机器人的适应性和功能性。该项目的重点是将LLM与数据库合并，以改善决策并实现请求解释问题的知识获取。

[NLP-16] Generative Expressive Conversational Speech Synthesis ACM-MM2024
[NLP-16] 生成式表达式对话语音合成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21491
作者: Rui Liu,Yifan Hu,Ren Yi,Yin Xiang,Haizhou Li
关键词-EN: Conversational Speech Synthesis, user-agent conversation setting, proper speaking style, Speech Synthesis, aims to express
关键词-ZN: 对话语音合成，用户代理对话设置，正确的说话风格，语音合成，旨在表达
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: 14 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Accepted by ACM MM 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Conversational Speech Synthesis (CSS) aims to express a target utterance with the proper speaking style in a user-agent conversation setting. Existing CSS methods employ effective multi-modal context modeling techniques to achieve empathy understanding and expression. However, they often need to design complex network architectures and meticulously optimize the modules within them. In addition, due to the limitations of small-scale datasets containing scripted recording styles, they often fail to simulate real natural conversational styles. To address the above issues, we propose a novel generative expressive CSS system, termed GPT-Talker.We transform the multimodal information of the multi-turn dialogue history into discrete token sequences and seamlessly integrate them to form a comprehensive user-agent dialogue context. Leveraging the power of GPT, we predict the token sequence, that includes both semantic and style knowledge, of response for the agent. After that, the expressive conversational speech is synthesized by the conversation-enriched VITS to deliver feedback to the user.Furthermore, we propose a large-scale Natural CSS Dataset called NCSSD, that includes both naturally recorded conversational speech in improvised styles and dialogues extracted from TV shows. It encompasses both Chinese and English languages, with a total duration of 236 hours.We conducted comprehensive experiments on the reliability of the NCSSD and the effectiveness of our GPT-Talker. Both subjective and objective evaluations demonstrate that our model outperforms other state-of-the-art CSS systems significantly in terms of naturalness and expressiveness. The Code, Dataset, and Pre-trained Model are available at: this https URL.
摘要：会话语音合成的目的是在用户-代理对话环境中以适当的说话风格表达目标话语。现有的语境论方法采用了有效的多通道语境建模技术来实现移情、理解和表达。但是，他们通常需要设计复杂的网络架构，并精心优化其中的模块。此外，由于包含脚本记录风格的小规模数据集的限制，它们往往无法模拟真正的自然对话风格。针对上述问题，我们提出了一种新的产生式表达的对话系统GPT-Talker，将多轮对话历史中的多通道信息转换为离散的令牌序列，并将它们无缝地集成在一起，形成一个全面的用户-代理对话上下文。利用GPT的能力，我们预测了智能体响应的令牌序列，包括语义和样式知识。在此基础上，我们提出了一个大规模的自然会话语料库NCSSD，它包括自然录制的即兴对话和从电视节目中提取的对话。它包括汉语和英语两种语言，总时长236小时。我们对NCSSD的可靠性和我们的GPT-Talker的有效性进行了全面的实验。主观和客观评价都表明，我们的模型在自然度和表现力方面明显优于其他最先进的CSS系统。代码、数据集和预先训练的模型可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-17] Maverick: Efficient and Accurate Coreference Resolution Defying Recent Trends ACL2024
[NLP-17] 特立独行：高效准确的共同参考解决方案挑战最新趋势

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21489
作者: Giuliano Martinelli,Edoardo Barba,Roberto Navigli
关键词-EN: Natural Language Processing, Language Processing tasks, Natural Language, Language Processing, Coreference Resolution task
关键词-ZN: 自然语言处理、语言处理任务、自然语言、语言处理、共指解析任务
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Accepted at main conference of ACL 2024. 15 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large autoregressive generative models have emerged as the cornerstone for achieving the highest performance across several Natural Language Processing tasks. However, the urge to attain superior results has, at times, led to the premature replacement of carefully designed task-specific approaches without exhaustive experimentation. The Coreference Resolution task is no exception; all recent state-of-the-art solutions adopt large generative autoregressive models that outperform encoder-based discriminative systems. In this work,we challenge this recent trend by introducing Maverick, a carefully designed - yet simple - pipeline, which enables running a state-of-the-art Coreference Resolution system within the constraints of an academic budget, outperforming models with up to 13 billion parameters with as few as 500 million parameters. Maverick achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CoNLL-2012 benchmark, training with up to 0.006x the memory resources and obtaining a 170x faster inference compared to previous state-of-the-art systems. We extensively validate the robustness of the Maverick framework with an array of diverse experiments, reporting improvements over prior systems in data-scarce, long-document, and out-of-domain settings. We release our code and models for research purposes at this https URL.
摘要：大型自回归生成模型已经成为在几个自然语言处理任务中实现最高性能的基石。然而，取得更好结果的冲动有时会导致在没有进行详尽试验的情况下过早地替换精心设计的针对具体任务的方法。共指解析任务也不例外；最近所有最先进的解决方案都采用了性能优于基于编码器的判别系统的大型生成性自回归模型。在这项工作中，我们通过引入Maverick来挑战这一最近的趋势，Maverick是一种精心设计但又简单的管道，可以在学术预算的限制下运行最先进的共指关系解析系统，其性能优于具有多达130亿个参数和少至5亿个参数的模型。Maverick在CoNLL-2012基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，与以前最先进的系统相比，训练时使用的内存资源高达0.006倍，推理速度快170倍。我们通过一系列不同的实验广泛地验证了Maverick框架的健壮性，报告了在数据稀缺、长文档和域外设置方面相对于以前系统的改进。我们在此HTTPS URL上发布用于研究目的的代码和模型。

[NLP-18] On the Problem of Text-To-Speech Model Selection for Synthetic Data Generation in Automatic Speech Recognition
[NLP-18] 自动语音识别中合成数据生成的文本到语音模型选择问题

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21476
作者: Nick Rossenbach,Ralf Schlüter,Sakriani Sakti
关键词-EN: spoken language translation, natural language processing, language translation, development of neural, automatic speech recognition
关键词-ZN: 口语翻译、自然语言处理、语言翻译、神经开发、自动语音识别
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注: Accepted at the SynData4GenAI 2024 workshop

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The rapid development of neural text-to-speech (TTS) systems enabled its usage in other areas of natural language processing such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) or spoken language translation (SLT). Due to the large number of different TTS architectures and their extensions, selecting which TTS systems to use for synthetic data creation is not an easy task. We use the comparison of five different TTS decoder architectures in the scope of synthetic data generation to show the impact on CTC-based speech recognition training. We compare the recognition results to computable metrics like NISQA MOS and intelligibility, finding that there are no clear relations to the ASR performance. We also observe that for data generation auto-regressive decoding performs better than non-autoregressive decoding, and propose an approach to quantify TTS generalization capabilities.
摘要：神经文本转语音（TTC）系统的快速发展使其能够用于自然语言处理的其他领域，例如自动语音识别（ASB）或口语翻译（RST）。由于有大量不同的TTC体系结构及其扩展，选择使用哪些TTC系统来创建合成数据并不是一件容易的事情。我们在合成数据生成范围内使用了五种不同的TTC解码器架构的比较，以显示对基于CTE的语音识别训练的影响。我们将识别结果与NISQA MOS和可理解度等可计算指标进行比较，发现与ASB性能没有明确的关系。我们还观察到，对于数据生成来说，自回归解码的性能优于非自回归解码，并提出了一种量化TTC概括能力的方法。

[NLP-19] Navigating Beyond Instructions: Vision-and-Language Navigation in Obstructed Environments
[NLP-19] 超越指令的导航：障碍环境中的视觉和语言导航

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21452
作者: Haodong Hong,Sen Wang,Zi Huang,Qi Wu,Jiajun Liu
关键词-EN: Real-world navigation, moved objects, closed doors, unpredictable entities, involves dealing
关键词-ZN: 现实世界的导航、移动的物体、关闭的门、不可预测的实体，涉及交易
类目: Robotics (cs.RO); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: Accepted to MM 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Real-world navigation often involves dealing with unexpected obstructions such as closed doors, moved objects, and unpredictable entities. However, mainstream Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) tasks typically assume instructions perfectly align with the fixed and predefined navigation graphs without any obstructions. This assumption overlooks potential discrepancies in actual navigation graphs and given instructions, which can cause major failures for both indoor and outdoor agents. To address this issue, we integrate diverse obstructions into the R2R dataset by modifying both the navigation graphs and visual observations, introducing an innovative dataset and task, R2R with UNexpected Obstructions (R2R-UNO). R2R-UNO contains various types and numbers of path obstructions to generate instruction-reality mismatches for VLN research. Experiments on R2R-UNO reveal that state-of-the-art VLN methods inevitably encounter significant challenges when facing such mismatches, indicating that they rigidly follow instructions rather than navigate adaptively. Therefore, we propose a novel method called ObVLN (Obstructed VLN), which includes a curriculum training strategy and virtual graph construction to help agents effectively adapt to obstructed environments. Empirical results show that ObVLN not only maintains robust performance in unobstructed scenarios but also achieves a substantial performance advantage with unexpected obstructions.
摘要：现实世界中的导航通常涉及处理意外障碍，如关闭的门、移动的对象和不可预测的实体。然而，主流视觉和语言导航(VLN)任务通常假定指令与固定和预定义的导航图完全一致，没有任何障碍。这一假设忽略了实际导航图和给定指令中的潜在差异，这可能会导致室内和室外代理的重大故障。为了解决这个问题，我们通过修改导航图和视觉观测将各种障碍集成到R2R数据集中，引入了一个创新的数据集和任务，即具有意外障碍的R2R(R2R-UNO)。R2R-UNO包含各种类型和数量的路径障碍，以产生用于VLN研究的指令与现实不匹配。在R2R-UNO上的实验表明，当面临这种不匹配时，最新的VLN方法不可避免地会遇到重大挑战，这表明它们严格遵循指令，而不是自适应导航。因此，我们提出了一种新的方法ObVLN(阻塞式VLN)，该方法包括课程训练策略和虚拟图构造，以帮助代理有效地适应障碍环境。实验结果表明，ObVLN不仅在无障碍的情况下保持了稳健的性能，而且在出现意外障碍的情况下也获得了显著的性能优势。

[NLP-20] Improving Faithfulness of Large Language Models in Summarization via Sliding Generation and Self-Consistency LREC COLING2024
[NLP-20] 通过滑动生成和自一致性提高大型语言模型在摘要中的忠实性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21443
作者: Taiji Li,Zhi Li,Yin Zhang
关键词-EN: large language models, problem called hallucinations, factual inconsistency problem, inconsistency problem called, demonstrated impressive performance
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，称为幻觉的问题，事实不一致问题，称为不一致问题，表现出令人印象深刻的性能
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Long paper accepted at LREC-COLING 2024 (oral)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Despite large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various tasks, they are still suffering from the factual inconsistency problem called hallucinations. For instance, LLMs occasionally generate content that diverges from source article, and prefer to extract information that appears at the beginning and end of the context, especially in long document summarization. Inspired by these findings, we propose to improve the faithfulness of LLMs in summarization by impelling them to process the entire article more fairly and faithfully. We present a novel summary generation strategy, namely SliSum, which exploits the ideas of sliding windows and self-consistency. Specifically, SliSum divides the source article into overlapping windows, and utilizes LLM to generate local summaries for the content in the windows. Finally, SliSum aggregates all local summaries using clustering and majority voting algorithm to produce more faithful summary of entire article. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SliSum significantly improves the faithfulness of diverse LLMs including LLaMA-2, Claude-2 and GPT-3.5 in both short and long text summarization, while maintaining their fluency and informativeness and without additional fine-tuning and resources. We further conduct qualitative and quantitative studies to investigate why SliSum works and impacts of hyperparameters in SliSum on performance.
摘要：尽管大型语言模型(LLM)在各种任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的表现，但它们仍然受到被称为幻觉的事实不一致问题的困扰。例如，LLM偶尔会生成与源文章不同的内容，并且更喜欢提取出现在上下文开头和结尾的信息，特别是在长文档摘要中。受这些发现的启发，我们建议通过促使LLMS更公平、更忠实地处理整篇文章来提高LLMS在摘要中的忠实性。我们提出了一种新的摘要生成策略，即SliSum，它利用了滑动窗口和自洽的思想。具体地说，SliSum将源文章划分为多个重叠的窗口，并利用LLM为窗口中的内容生成本地摘要。最后，SliSum使用聚类和多数投票算法对所有局部摘要进行聚合，以生成更真实的全文摘要。大量实验表明，SliSum显著提高了包括Llama-2、Claude-2和GPT-3.5在内的各种LLM在短文本摘要和长文本摘要中的忠实性，同时保持了它们的流畅性和信息量，并且不需要额外的微调和资源。我们进一步进行定性和定量研究，以探讨SliSum的工作原理以及SliSum中的超参数对性能的影响。

[NLP-21] QuestGen: Effectiveness of Question Generation Methods for Fact-Checking Applications CIKM2024
[NLP-21] QuestGen：事实核查应用程序的问题生成方法的有效性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21441
作者: Rivik Setty,Vinay Setty
关键词-EN: Verifying fact-checking claims, Verifying fact-checking, fact-checking claims poses, significant challenge, poses a significant
关键词-ZN: 事实核查索赔，事实核查，事实核查索赔构成了重大挑战，构成了重大
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted in CIKM 2024 as a short paper 4 pages and 1 page references

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Verifying fact-checking claims poses a significant challenge, even for humans. Recent approaches have demonstrated that decomposing claims into relevant questions to gather evidence enhances the efficiency of the fact-checking process. In this paper, we provide empirical evidence showing that this question decomposition can be effectively automated. We demonstrate that smaller generative models, fine-tuned for the question generation task using data augmentation from various datasets, outperform large language models by up to 8%. Surprisingly, in some cases, the evidence retrieved using machine-generated questions proves to be significantly more effective for fact-checking than that obtained from human-written questions. We also perform manual evaluation of the decomposed questions to assess the quality of the questions generated.
摘要：事实核查主张即使对人类来说也是一个重大挑战。最近的方法表明，将主张分解为相关问题以收集证据可以提高事实核查过程的效率。在本文中，我们提供了经验证据，表明这个问题分解可以有效地自动化。我们证明，较小的生成模型（使用来自各种数据集的数据增强针对问题生成任务进行微调）的性能比大型语言模型高出8%。令人惊讶的是，在某些情况下，使用机器生成的问题检索的证据被证明比从人类书面问题中获得的证据对于事实核查来说明显更有效。我们还对分解的问题执行手动评估，以评估生成的问题的质量。

[NLP-22] MLLM Is a Strong Reranker: Advancing Multimodal Retrieval-augmented Generation via Knowledge-enhanced Reranking and Noise-injected Training
[NLP-22] MLLM是一个强大的重新排序者：通过知识增强的重新排序和噪音注入训练推进多模式检索增强生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21439
作者: Zhanpeng Chen,Chengjin Xu,Yiyan Qi,Jian Guo
关键词-EN: Multimodal Large Language, Large Language Models, Large Language, demonstrated remarkable capabilities, multiple data modalities
关键词-ZN: 多模式大型语言、大型语言模型、大型语言、展示了非凡的能力、多种数据模式
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in processing and generating content across multiple data modalities, including text, images, audio, and video. However, a significant drawback of MLLMs is their reliance on static training data, leading to outdated information and limited contextual awareness. This static nature hampers their ability to provide accurate, up-to-date responses, particularly in dynamic or rapidly evolving contexts. Integrating Multimodal Retrieval-augmented Generation (Multimodal RAG) offers a promising solution, but the system would inevitably encounter the multi-granularity noisy correspondence (MNC) problem, which involves two types of noise: coarse-grained (query-caption) and fine-grained (query-image). This noise hinders accurate retrieval and generation. In this work, we propose \textbfRagLLaVA, a novel framework with knowledge-enhanced reranking and noise-injected training, to address these limitations. We instruction-tune the MLLM with a simple yet effective instruction template to induce its ranking ability and serve it as a reranker to precisely filter the top-k retrieved images. For generation, we inject visual noise during training at the data and token levels to enhance the generator’s robustness. Extensive experiments are conducted on the subsets of two datasets that require retrieving and reasoning over images to answer a given query. Our results demonstrate the superiority of RagLLaVA in retrieving accurately and generating robustly. Code and models are available at this https URL.
摘要：多模式大语言模型在处理和生成包括文本、图像、音频和视频在内的多种数据模式的内容方面表现出了卓越的能力。然而，MLLMS的一个重大缺点是依赖静态培训数据，导致信息过时和对背景的认识有限。这种静态的性质妨碍了他们提供准确、最新反应的能力，特别是在动态或快速变化的情况下。集成多模式检索-增强生成技术(多模式RAG)提供了一个很有前途的解决方案，但系统不可避免地会遇到多粒度噪声对应(MNC)问题，其中涉及两种类型的噪声：粗粒度(查询-标题)和细粒度(查询-图像)。这种噪声阻碍了准确的检索和生成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的框架–文本bfRagLLaVA，该框架具有知识增强的重排序和噪声注入训练功能。我们使用一个简单而有效的指令模板对MLLM进行指令调整，以诱导其排序能力，并将其作为重定向器来精确过滤前k个检索到的图像。对于生成器，我们在训练过程中在数据和令牌级注入视觉噪声，以增强生成器的稳健性。在两个数据集的子集上进行了广泛的实验，这两个数据集需要对图像进行检索和推理才能回答给定的查询。实验结果表明，RagLLaVA在准确检索和稳健生成方面具有一定的优势。代码和模型可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-23] Cost-Effective Hallucination Detection for LLMs
[NLP-23] LLM的经济高效的幻觉检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21424
作者: Simon Valentin,Jinmiao Fu,Gianluca Detommaso,Shaoyuan Xu,Giovanni Zappella,Bryan Wang
关键词-EN: Large language models, generating unreliable outputs, Large language, language models, generating unreliable
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，生成不可靠的输出，大型语言，语言模型，生成不可靠的输出
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) can be prone to hallucinations - generating unreliable outputs that are unfaithful to their inputs, external facts or internally inconsistent. In this work, we address several challenges for post-hoc hallucination detection in production settings. Our pipeline for hallucination detection entails: first, producing a confidence score representing the likelihood that a generated answer is a hallucination; second, calibrating the score conditional on attributes of the inputs and candidate response; finally, performing detection by thresholding the calibrated score. We benchmark a variety of state-of-the-art scoring methods on different datasets, encompassing question answering, fact checking, and summarization tasks. We employ diverse LLMs to ensure a comprehensive assessment of performance. We show that calibrating individual scoring methods is critical for ensuring risk-aware downstream decision making. Based on findings that no individual score performs best in all situations, we propose a multi-scoring framework, which combines different scores and achieves top performance across all datasets. We further introduce cost-effective multi-scoring, which can match or even outperform more expensive detection methods, while significantly reducing computational overhead.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)容易产生幻觉–产生不可靠的输出，这些输出不符合它们的输入、外部事实或内部不一致。在这项工作中，我们解决了生产环境中后幻觉检测的几个挑战。我们的幻觉检测流水线需要：首先，产生一个表示产生的答案是幻觉的可能性的置信度分数；其次，根据输入和候选反应的属性来校准分数；最后，通过对校准的分数进行阈值来执行检测。我们在不同的数据集上对各种最先进的评分方法进行了基准测试，包括问题回答、事实核查和摘要任务。我们使用不同的LLM来确保对绩效的全面评估。我们表明，校准个人评分方法对于确保有风险意识的下游决策至关重要。基于没有单独的分数在所有情况下都表现最好的发现，我们提出了一个多分数框架，该框架结合了不同的分数并在所有数据集上实现了最好的性能。我们进一步引入了具有成本效益的多重评分，它可以与更昂贵的检测方法相媲美，甚至可以超越更昂贵的检测方法，同时显著减少计算开销。

[NLP-24] Dancing in Chains: Reconciling Instruction Following and Faithfulness in Language Models
[NLP-24] 链条中的舞蹈：语言模型中的指令遵循和忠实性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21417
作者: Zhengxuan Wu,Yuhao Zhang,Peng Qi,Yumo Xu,Rujun Han,Yian Zhang,Jifan Chen,Bonan Min,Zhiheng Huang
关键词-EN: Modern language models, Modern language, language models, fail to achieve, follow human instructions
关键词-ZN: 现代语言模型，现代语言，语言模型，未能实现，遵循人类指令
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Modern language models (LMs) need to follow human instructions while being faithful; yet, they often fail to achieve both. Here, we provide concrete evidence of a trade-off between instruction following (i.e., follow open-ended instructions) and faithfulness (i.e., ground responses in given context) when training LMs with these objectives. For instance, fine-tuning LLaMA-7B on instruction following datasets renders it less faithful. Conversely, instruction-tuned Vicuna-7B shows degraded performance at following instructions when further optimized on tasks that require contextual grounding. One common remedy is multi-task learning (MTL) with data mixing, yet it remains far from achieving a synergic outcome. We propose a simple yet effective method that relies on Rejection Sampling for Continued Self-instruction Tuning (ReSet), which significantly outperforms vanilla MTL. Surprisingly, we find that less is more, as training ReSet with high-quality, yet substantially smaller data (three-fold less) yields superior results. Our findings offer a better understanding of objective discrepancies in alignment training of LMs.
摘要：现代语言模型需要在忠实的同时遵循人类的指令，然而，它们往往无法同时实现这两个目标。在这里，我们提供了具体的证据表明，当培训LMS实现这些目标时，遵循指令(即，遵循开放式指令)和忠诚度(即，在给定背景下的地面反应)之间存在权衡。例如，根据数据集对指令进行微调的骆驼-7B会使其不那么可信。相反，指令调优的维库纳-7B在对需要上下文接地的任务进行进一步优化时，在遵循指令时表现出性能下降。一种常见的补救方法是带有数据混合的多任务学习(MTL)，但它仍远未达到协同结果。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，该方法依靠拒收采样来进行持续自指令调整(RESET)，其性能明显优于普通MTL。令人惊讶的是，我们发现越少越好，因为训练使用高质量的数据重置，但数据要小得多(少三倍)，会产生更好的结果。我们的研究结果为更好地理解LMS对齐训练中的客观差异提供了依据。

[NLP-25] GEGA: Graph Convolutional Networks and Evidence Retrieval Guided Attention for Enhanced Document-level Relation Extraction
[NLP-25] GEGA：图卷积网络和证据检索引导关注增强的文档级关系提取

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21384
作者: Yanxu Mao,Peipei Liu,Tiehan Cui
关键词-EN: Document-level relation extraction, Document-level relation, unstructured document text, aims to extract, entities from unstructured
关键词-ZN: 文档级关系提取，文档级关系，非结构化文档文本，旨在从非结构化中提取实体
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Document-level relation extraction (DocRE) aims to extract relations between entities from unstructured document text. Compared to sentence-level relation extraction, it requires more complex semantic understanding from a broader text context. Currently, some studies are utilizing logical rules within evidence sentences to enhance the performance of DocRE. However, in the data without provided evidence sentences, researchers often obtain a list of evidence sentences for the entire document through evidence retrieval (ER). Therefore, DocRE suffers from two challenges: firstly, the relevance between evidence and entity pairs is weak; secondly, there is insufficient extraction of complex cross-relations between long-distance multi-entities. To overcome these challenges, we propose GEGA, a novel model for DocRE. The model leverages graph neural networks to construct multiple weight matrices, guiding attention allocation to evidence sentences. It also employs multi-scale representation aggregation to enhance ER. Subsequently, we integrate the most efficient evidence information to implement both fully supervised and weakly supervised training processes for the model. We evaluate the GEGA model on three widely used benchmark datasets: DocRED, Re-DocRED, and Revisit-DocRED. The experimental results indicate that our model has achieved comprehensive improvements compared to the existing SOTA model.
摘要：文档级关系抽取的目的是从非结构化文档文本中抽取实体间的关系。与句子级关系提取相比，它需要从更广泛的文本上下文中进行更复杂的语义理解。目前，一些研究正在利用证据语句中的逻辑规则来提高DocRE的性能。然而，在没有提供证据句的数据中，研究人员往往通过证据检索(ER)来获取整个文档的证据句列表。因此，DocRE面临着两个挑战：第一，证据与实体对之间的相关性较弱；第二，对远距离多实体之间复杂的交叉关系提取不足。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的DocRE模型Gega。该模型利用图神经网络构造多个权重矩阵，引导注意力分配到证据句子。它还采用多尺度表示聚合来增强ER。随后，我们集成了最有效的证据信息来实现模型的完全监督和弱监督训练过程。我们在三个广泛使用的基准数据集上对Gega模型进行了评估：DocRED、Re-DocRED和Reviser-DocRED。实验结果表明，与已有的SOTA模型相比，我们的模型有了全面的改进。

[NLP-26] Prompting Medical Large Vision-Language Models to Diagnose Pathologies by Visual Question Answering
[NLP-26] 通过视觉问题回答，引入医学大型视觉语言模型来诊断病理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21368
作者: Danfeng Guo,Demetri Terzopoulos
关键词-EN: Large Vision-Language Models, achieved significant success, medical Visual Question, Visual Question Answering, Large Vision-Language
关键词-ZN: 大型视觉语言模型，取得了重大成功，医学视觉问题，视觉问题解答，大型视觉语言
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved significant success in recent years, and they have been extended to the medical domain. Although demonstrating satisfactory performance on medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) tasks, Medical LVLMs (MLVLMs) suffer from the hallucination problem, which makes them fail to diagnose complex pathologies. Moreover, they readily fail to learn minority pathologies due to imbalanced training data. We propose two prompting strategies for MLVLMs that reduce hallucination and improve VQA performance. In the first strategy, we provide a detailed explanation of the queried pathology. In the second strategy, we fine-tune a cheap, weak learner to achieve high performance on a specific metric, and textually provide its judgment to the MLVLM. Tested on the MIMIC-CXR-JPG and Chexpert datasets, our methods significantly improve the diagnostic F1 score, with the highest increase being 0.27. We also demonstrate that our prompting strategies can be extended to general LVLM domains. Based on POPE metrics, it effectively suppresses the false negative predictions of existing LVLMs and improves Recall by approximately 0.07.
此外，由于训练数据不平衡，他们很容易无法学习少数民族的病理。我们为MLVLMS提出了两种刺激策略，以减少幻觉并提高VQA性能。在第一种策略中，我们提供了对被质疑的病理的详细解释。我们还证明了我们的提示策略可以扩展到一般的LVLM域。基于Pope度量，它有效地抑制了现有LVLM的假阴性预测，并将召回率提高了约0.07%。

[NLP-27] Performance of Recent Large Language Models for a Low-Resourced Language
[NLP-27] 低资源语言的最新大型语言模型的性能

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21330
作者: Ravindu Jayakody,Gihan Dias
关键词-EN: shown significant advances, Large Language Models, past year, shown significant, significant advances
关键词-ZN: 显示出显着的进步，大型语言模型去年显示出显着的进步
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown significant advances in the past year. In addition to new versions of GPT and Llama, several other LLMs have been introduced recently. Some of these are open models available for download and modification. Although multilingual large language models have been available for some time, their performance on low-resourced languages such as Sinhala has been poor. We evaluated four recent LLMs on their performance directly in the Sinhala language, and by translation to and from English. We also evaluated their fine-tunability with a small amount of fine-tuning data. Claude and GPT 4o perform well out-of-the-box and do significantly better than previous versions. Llama and Mistral perform poorly but show some promise of improvement with fine tuning. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2407.21330 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2407.21330v1 [cs.CL] for this version)
摘要：大型语言模型（LLM）在过去的一年中取得了显着的进展。除了GPT和Llama的新版本外，最近还推出了其他几种LLM。其中一些是开放模型，可供下载和修改。尽管多语言大型语言模型已经出现一段时间，但它们在僧加罗语等低资源语言上的性能一直很差。我们直接用僧加罗语以及通过英语翻译来评估了最近的四位法学硕士的表现。我们还使用少量微调数据评估了它们的微调性。Claude和GPT 4o开箱即用表现良好，并且明显优于之前的版本。Lama和Mistral表现不佳，但通过微调显示出一些改进的希望。 科目：计算和语言（cs.CL）引用为：arXiv：2407.21330 [cs.CL] (or arXiv：2407.21330v1 [cs.CL]适用于此版本）

[NLP-28] Beyond Silent Letters: Amplifying LLMs in Emotion Recognition with Vocal Nuances
[NLP-28] 超越无声的信件：用声乐细微差别放大情感识别中的LLM

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21315
作者: Zehui Wu,Ziwei Gong,Lin Ai,Pengyuan Shi,Kaan Donbekci,Julia Hirschberg
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, paper introduces, Models
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，语言模型，大型语言，论文介绍，模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces a novel approach to emotion detection in speech using Large Language Models (LLMs). We address the limitation of LLMs in processing audio inputs by translating speech characteristics into natural language descriptions. Our method integrates these descriptions into text prompts, enabling LLMs to perform multimodal emotion analysis without architectural modifications. We evaluate our approach on two datasets: IEMOCAP and MELD, demonstrating significant improvements in emotion recognition accuracy, particularly for high-quality audio data. Our experiments show that incorporating speech descriptions yields a 2 percentage point increase in weighted F1 score on IEMOCAP (from 70.111% to 72.596%). We also compare various LLM architectures and explore the effectiveness of different feature representations. Our findings highlight the potential of this approach in enhancing emotion detection capabilities of LLMs and underscore the importance of audio quality in speech-based emotion recognition tasks. We’ll release the source code on Github.
摘要：介绍了一种新的基于大语言模型的语音情感检测方法。我们通过将语音特征转换为自然语言描述来解决LLMS在处理音频输入方面的局限性。我们的方法将这些描述集成到文本提示中，使LLMS能够在不修改体系结构的情况下执行多通道情感分析。我们在两个数据集：IEMOCAP和MELD上对我们的方法进行了评估，表明我们的方法在情感识别准确率方面有了显著的提高，特别是对于高质量的音频数据。我们的实验表明，在IEMOCAP上加入语音描述可以使加权F1分数增加2个百分点(从70.111分增加到72.596分)。我们还比较了各种LLM体系结构，并探索了不同特征表示的有效性。我们的发现突出了这种方法在增强LLMS的情感检测能力方面的潜力，并强调了音频质量在基于语音的情感识别任务中的重要性。我们会在Github上发布源代码。

[NLP-29] Multi-Level Querying using A Knowledge Pyramid
[NLP-29] 使用知识金字塔的多层查询

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21276
作者: Rubing Chen,Xulu Zhang,Jiaxin Wu,Wenqi Fan,Xiao-Yong Wei,Qing Li
关键词-EN: existing Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, paper addresses, existing Retrieval-Augmented, primarily focus
关键词-ZN: 现有检索-增强代、检索-增强代、论文地址、现有检索-增强代、主要焦点
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper addresses the need for improved precision in existing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods that primarily focus on enhancing recall. We propose a multi-layer knowledge pyramid approach within the RAG framework to achieve a better balance between precision and recall. The knowledge pyramid consists of three layers: Ontologies, Knowledge Graphs (KGs), and chunk-based raw text. We employ cross-layer augmentation techniques for comprehensive knowledge coverage and dynamic updates of the Ontology schema and instances. To ensure compactness, we utilize cross-layer filtering methods for knowledge condensation in KGs. Our approach, named PolyRAG, follows a waterfall model for retrieval, starting from the top of the pyramid and progressing down until a confident answer is obtained. We introduce two benchmarks for domain-specific knowledge retrieval, one in the academic domain and the other in the financial domain. The effectiveness of the methods has been validated through comprehensive experiments by outperforming 19 SOTA methods. An encouraging observation is that the proposed method has augmented the GPT-4, providing 395% F1 gain by improving its performance from 0.1636 to 0.8109.
摘要：本文讨论了现有检索增强生成(RAG)方法中提高查准率的需求，这些方法主要集中在提高召回率上。为了在查准率和查全率之间取得更好的平衡，我们在RAG框架内提出了一种多层知识金字塔方法。知识金字塔由三层组成：本体、知识图(KGs)和基于块的原始文本。我们使用跨层增强技术来实现全面的知识复盖以及本体模式和实例的动态更新。为了保证知识的紧凑性，我们使用跨层过滤的方法来进行知识压缩。我们的方法，命名为PolyRAG，遵循一个瀑布模型进行检索，从金字塔的顶部开始，向下进行，直到得到一个可信的答案。我们引入了两个领域特定知识检索的基准，一个在学术领域，另一个在金融领域。通过综合实验验证了该方法的有效性，其性能优于19种SOTA方法。一个令人鼓舞的观察是，所提出的方法增强了GPT-4，通过将其性能从0.1636提高到0.8109，提供了395F1增益。

[NLP-30] Model Attribution in Machine-Generated Disinformation: A Domain Generalization Approach with Supervised Contrastive Learning
[NLP-30] 机器生成虚假信息中的模型归因：一种具有监督对比学习的领域概括方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21264
作者: Alimohammad Beigi,Zhen Tan,Nivedh Mudiam,Canyu Chen,Kai Shu,Huan Liu
关键词-EN: machine-generated disinformation poses, mitigating its spread, poses a significant, understanding its origins, origins and mitigating
关键词-ZN: 机器生成的虚假信息构成，减缓其传播，构成重大，了解其起源、起源和缓解
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 10 pages, 2 figures, accepted at DSAA 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Model attribution for machine-generated disinformation poses a significant challenge in understanding its origins and mitigating its spread. This task is especially challenging because modern large language models (LLMs) produce disinformation with human-like quality. Additionally, the diversity in prompting methods used to generate disinformation complicates accurate source attribution. These methods introduce domain-specific features that can mask the fundamental characteristics of the models. In this paper, we introduce the concept of model attribution as a domain generalization problem, where each prompting method represents a unique domain. We argue that an effective attribution model must be invariant to these domain-specific features. It should also be proficient in identifying the originating models across all scenarios, reflecting real-world detection challenges. To address this, we introduce a novel approach based on Supervised Contrastive Learning. This method is designed to enhance the model’s robustness to variations in prompts and focuses on distinguishing between different source LLMs. We evaluate our model through rigorous experiments involving three common prompting methods: open-ended'', rewriting’‘, and paraphrasing'', and three advanced LLMs: llama 2’‘, chatgpt'', and vicuna’'. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in model attribution tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance across diverse and unseen datasets.
摘要：机器产生的虚假信息的模型归因对理解其起源和减少其传播提出了重大挑战。这项任务尤其具有挑战性，因为现代大型语言模型(LLM)产生的虚假信息具有类似人类的质量。此外，用于产生虚假信息的提示方法的多样性使准确的来源归因变得复杂。这些方法引入了特定于领域的功能，可以掩盖模型的基本特征。在本文中，我们引入了模型属性的概念作为一个领域泛化问题，其中每种提示方法代表一个唯一的领域。我们认为一个有效的归因模型必须与这些领域特定的特征保持不变。它还应该熟练地识别所有场景中的原始模型，反映现实世界的检测挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于有监督对比学习的新方法。该方法旨在增强模型对提示变化的稳健性，并侧重于区分不同来源的LLM。我们通过严格的实验对我们的模型进行了评估，实验涉及三种常见的提示方法：“开放式”、“重写”和“释义”，以及三种先进的LLM：“骆驼2”、“chat gpt”和“vicuna”。我们的结果证明了我们的方法在模型属性任务中的有效性，在不同的和不可见的数据集上获得了最先进的性能。

[NLP-31] Adaptive Pre-training Data Detection for Large Language Models via Surprising Tokens
[NLP-31] 通过令人惊讶的令牌对大型语言模型进行自适应预训练数据检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21248
作者: Anqi Zhang,Chaofeng Wu
关键词-EN: Membership Inference Attacks, large language models, detecting pre-training data, opaque training data, large language
关键词-ZN: 成员资格推理攻击、大型语言模型、检测训练前数据、不透明训练数据、大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While large language models (LLMs) are extensively used, there are raising concerns regarding privacy, security, and copyright due to their opaque training data, which brings the problem of detecting pre-training data on the table. Current solutions to this problem leverage techniques explored in machine learning privacy such as Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs), which heavily depend on LLMs’ capability of verbatim memorization. However, this reliance presents challenges, especially given the vast amount of training data and the restricted number of effective training epochs. In this paper, we propose an adaptive pre-training data detection method which alleviates this reliance and effectively amplify the identification. Our method adaptively locates \textitsurprising tokens of the input. A token is surprising to a LLM if the prediction on the token is “certain but wrong”, which refers to low Shannon entropy of the probability distribution and low probability of the ground truth token at the same time. By using the prediction probability of surprising tokens to measure \textitsurprising, the detection method is achieved based on the simple hypothesis that seeing seen data is less surprising for the model compared with seeing unseen data. The method can be applied without any access to the the pre-training data corpus or additional training like reference models. Our approach exhibits a consistent enhancement compared to existing methods in diverse experiments conducted on various benchmarks and models, achieving a maximum improvement of 29.5%. We also introduce a new benchmark Dolma-Book developed upon a novel framework, which employs book data collected both before and after model training to provide further evaluation.
摘要：在大型语言模型被广泛使用的同时，由于其训练数据不透明，引起了人们对隐私、安全和版权的担忧，这带来了检测表上的训练前数据的问题。目前对这个问题的解决方案利用了在机器学习隐私中探索的技术，如成员推理攻击(MIA)，这在很大程度上依赖于LLMS的逐字记忆能力。然而，这种依赖带来了挑战，特别是考虑到大量的培训数据和有限的有效培训周期。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应预训练数据检测方法，减轻了这种依赖，并有效地放大了识别。我们的方法自适应地定位输入的令人惊讶的标记。如果令牌上的预测是肯定但错误的，则令牌令LLM感到惊讶，这指的是令牌的概率分布的低香农熵和基本真值令牌的低概率。通过使用令人惊讶的标记的预测概率来度量文本令人惊讶，该检测方法基于这样一个简单的假设：对于模型来说，与看到未见的数据相比，看到看到的数据并不那么令人惊讶。该方法可以在不访问训练前数据语料库或参考模型等额外训练的情况下应用。在不同的基准和模型上进行的不同实验中，与现有方法相比，我们的方法表现出一致的改进，最大改进达到29.5%。我们还介绍了一个新的基准Dolma-Book，它是在一个新的框架上开发的，它使用在模型训练之前和之后收集的书籍数据来提供进一步的评估。

[NLP-32] Advancing Vietnamese Visual Question Answering with Transformer and Convolutional Integration
[NLP-32] 利用Transformer和卷积整合推进越南视觉问题解答

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21229
作者: Ngoc Son Nguyen,Van Son Nguyen,Tung Le
关键词-EN: Visual Question Answering, Vietnamese Visual Question, Question Answering, Visual Question, potential research domain
关键词-ZN: 视觉问题解答，越南视觉问题，问题解答，视觉问题，潜在的研究领域
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted at the journal of Computers Electrical Engineering (Received 8 March 2024, Revised 8 June 2024, Accepted 10 July 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Visual Question Answering (VQA) has recently emerged as a potential research domain, captivating the interest of many in the field of artificial intelligence and computer vision. Despite the prevalence of approaches in English, there is a notable lack of systems specifically developed for certain languages, particularly Vietnamese. This study aims to bridge this gap by conducting comprehensive experiments on the Vietnamese Visual Question Answering (ViVQA) dataset, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed model. In response to community interest, we have developed a model that enhances image representation capabilities, thereby improving overall performance in the ViVQA system. Specifically, our model integrates the Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training with frozen unimodal models (BLIP-2) and the convolutional neural network EfficientNet to extract and process both local and global features from images. This integration leverages the strengths of transformer-based architectures for capturing comprehensive contextual information and convolutional networks for detailed local features. By freezing the parameters of these pre-trained models, we significantly reduce the computational cost and training time, while maintaining high performance. This approach significantly improves image representation and enhances the performance of existing VQA systems. We then leverage a multi-modal fusion module based on a general-purpose multi-modal foundation model (BEiT-3) to fuse the information between visual and textual features. Our experimental findings demonstrate that our model surpasses competing baselines, achieving promising performance. This is particularly evident in its accuracy of 71.04% on the test set of the ViVQA dataset, marking a significant advancement in our research area. The code is available at this https URL.
摘要：视觉问答近年来成为一个潜在的研究领域，吸引了人工智能和计算机视觉领域的许多人的兴趣。尽管英语的方法很普遍，但明显缺乏专门为某些语言开发的系统，特别是越南语。本研究旨在通过在越南语视觉问答(ViVQA)数据集上进行全面的实验来弥补这一差距，证明了我们所提出的模型的有效性。为了响应公众的兴趣，我们开发了一个模型，该模型增强了图像表示能力，从而提高了ViVQA系统的整体性能。具体地说，我们的模型将Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-Training与冻结的单峰模型(BLIP-2)和卷积神经网络EfficientNet相结合，从图像中提取和处理局部和全局特征。这种集成利用了基于变压器的架构的优势，可以捕获全面的上下文信息，并利用卷积网络获取详细的本地功能。通过冻结这些预训练模型的参数，我们在保持高性能的同时，显著减少了计算成本和训练时间。该方法显著改善了图像表示，提高了现有VQA系统的性能。然后，我们利用基于通用多模式基础模型(BEIT-3)的多模式融合模块来融合视觉和文本特征之间的信息。我们的实验结果表明，我们的模型超过了竞争基线，取得了令人振奋的性能。这一点在ViVQA数据集的测试集上的71.04%的准确率上尤为明显，标志着我们研究领域的重大进步。代码可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-33] GenRec: Generative Personalized Sequential Recommendation
[NLP-33] GenRec：生成式个性化顺序推荐

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21191
作者: Panfeng Cao,Pietro Lio
关键词-EN: item interaction data, Sequential recommendation, interaction data, preferences from historical, capture hidden user
关键词-ZN: 项目交互数据、顺序推荐、交互数据、历史偏好、捕捉隐藏用户
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Sequential recommendation is a task to capture hidden user preferences from historical user item interaction data. Significant progress has been made in this domain by leveraging classification based learning methods. Inspired by the recent paradigm of ‘pretrain, prompt and predict’ in NLP, we consider sequential recommendation as a sequence to sequence generation task and propose a novel model named Generative Recommendation (GenRec). Unlike classification based models that learn explicit user and item representations, GenRec utilizes the sequence modeling capability of Transformer and adopts the masked item prediction objective to effectively learn the hidden bidirectional sequential patterns. Different from existing generative sequential recommendation models, GenRec does not rely on manually designed hard prompts. The input to GenRec is textual user item sequence and the output is top ranked next items. Moreover, GenRec is lightweight and requires only a few hours to train effectively in low-resource settings, making it highly applicable to real-world scenarios and helping to democratize large language models in the sequential recommendation domain. Our extensive experiments have demonstrated that GenRec generalizes on various public real-world datasets and achieves state-of-the-art results. Our experiments also validate the effectiveness of the the proposed masked item prediction objective that improves the model performance by a large margin.
摘要：序贯推荐是一种从历史用户项交互数据中获取隐藏的用户偏好的任务。通过利用基于分类的学习方法，在这一领域取得了重大进展。受NLP最近提出的“预训练、提示和预测”范式的启发，我们将序列推荐看作一种序列到序列生成任务，并提出了一种新的模型–生成性推荐(GenRec)。与学习显式用户和项目表示的基于分类的模型不同，GenRec利用Transformer的序列建模能力，采用掩蔽项目预测目标来有效地学习隐藏的双向序列模式。与已有的产生式序贯推荐模型不同，GenRec不依赖于人工设计的硬提示。GenRec的输入是文本用户项序列，输出是排名靠前的后续项。此外，GenRec是轻量级的，只需要几个小时就可以在低资源环境下进行有效的训练，使其高度适用于真实世界的场景，并有助于在顺序推荐领域中实现大型语言模型的民主化。我们的大量实验表明，GenRec能够在各种公开的真实数据集上进行泛化，并取得了最先进的结果。我们的实验还验证了所提出的掩蔽项预测目标的有效性，大大提高了模型的性能。

[NLP-34] Decomposed Prompting to Answer Questions on a Course Discussion Board
[NLP-34] 分解预算以回答课程讨论板上的问题

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21170
作者: Brandon Jaipersaud,Paul Zhang,Jimmy Ba,Andrew Petersen,Lisa Zhang,Michael R. Zhang
关键词-EN: answer student questions, discussion board, propose and evaluate, evaluate a question-answering, decomposed prompting
关键词-ZN: 回答学生问题，讨论板，提出和评估，评估问答，分解提示
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
备注: 6 pages. Published at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education 2023. Code repository: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We propose and evaluate a question-answering system that uses decomposed prompting to classify and answer student questions on a course discussion board. Our system uses a large language model (LLM) to classify questions into one of four types: conceptual, homework, logistics, and not answerable. This enables us to employ a different strategy for answering questions that fall under different types. Using a variant of GPT-3, we achieve 81% classification accuracy. We discuss our system’s performance on answering conceptual questions from a machine learning course and various failure modes.
摘要：我们提出并评估了一个问答系统，该系统使用分解提示来分类和回答课程讨论板上的学生问题。我们的系统使用大型语言模型（LLM）将问题分为四种类型之一：概念性、家庭作业、后勤和不可回答。这使我们能够采用不同的策略来回答不同类型的问题。使用GPT-3的变体，我们实现了81%的分类准确率。我们讨论了我们的系统在回答机器学习课程概念性问题和各种故障模式方面的性能。

[NLP-35] Event-Arguments Extraction Corpus and Modeling using BERT for Arabic
[NLP-35] 使用BERT的阿拉伯语事件参数提取数据库和建模

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21153
作者: Alaa Aljabari,Lina Duaibes,Mustafa Jarrar,Mohammed Khalilia
关键词-EN: sparse linguistic resources, Arabic due, linguistic resources, due to sparse, sparse linguistic
关键词-ZN: 稀疏语言资源，阿拉伯语，语言资源，由于稀疏，稀疏语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Event-argument extraction is a challenging task, particularly in Arabic due to sparse linguistic resources. To fill this gap, we introduce the \hadath corpus ( 550 k tokens) as an extension of Wojood, enriched with event-argument annotations. We used three types of event arguments: agent , location , and date , which we annotated as relation types. Our inter-annotator agreement evaluation resulted in 82.23% Kappa score and 87.2% F_1 -score. Additionally, we propose a novel method for event relation extraction using BERT, in which we treat the task as text entailment. This method achieves an F_1 -score of 94.01% . To further evaluate the generalization of our proposed method, we collected and annotated another out-of-domain corpus (about 80 k tokens) called \testNLI and used it as a second test set, on which our approach achieved promising results ( 83.59% F_1 -score). Last but not least, we propose an end-to-end system for event-arguments extraction. This system is implemented as part of SinaTools, and both corpora are publicly available at \small \urlthis https URL
摘要：事件论元提取是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在阿拉伯语中，由于语言资源稀缺。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了Hadath语料库(550k令牌)作为Wojood的扩展，其中包含丰富的事件参数注释。我们使用了三种类型的事件参数：代理、位置和日期，我们将它们注释为关系类型。我们的注释者间一致性评估结果为82.23 Kappa评分和87.2 F1评分。此外，我们还提出了一种新的基于ERT的事件关系提取方法，将任务视为文本蕴涵。该方法的F1得分为94.01%。为了进一步评估该方法的泛化能力，我们收集并标注了另一个域外语料库(约8万个语料库)–TestNLI，并将其作为第二个测试集，在该测试集上，我们的方法取得了令人满意的结果(83.59F1-Score)。最后，我们提出了一个端到端的事件论元提取系统。此系统是作为SinaTool的一部分实施的，这两个语料库都可以在以下网址上公开获得

[NLP-36] Enhancing Semantic Similarity Understanding in Arabic NLP with Nested Embedding Learning
[NLP-36] 利用嵌套嵌入学习增强阿拉伯语NLP中的语义相似性理解

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21139
作者: Omer Nacar,Anis Koubaa
关键词-EN: Matryoshka Embedding Learning, Arabic NLP downstream, Arabic Matryoshka embedding, Embedding Learning, Matryoshka embedding models
关键词-ZN: Matryoshka嵌入学习、阿拉伯语NLP下游、阿拉伯语Matryoshka嵌入、嵌入学习、Matryoshka嵌入模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This work presents a novel framework for training Arabic nested embedding models through Matryoshka Embedding Learning, leveraging multilingual, Arabic-specific, and English-based models, to highlight the power of nested embeddings models in various Arabic NLP downstream tasks.
